title: DV Project Manifest
description: Declares project data locations, index paths, command templates, and policy switches for the DV AI Coverage Closure system.

project.description: Project unique identifier, used by MCP tools to locate indexes.

owner_team.description: Team responsible for this project's DV.

top_instance.description: Default top-level DUT or block instance path (e.g. tb_top.u_dut.u_dma).

project_root.description: Root directory of the project source files. Supports environment variable expansion (e.g. $AXI2AHB_ROOT). All relative paths resolve against this directory. Defaults to the manifest file's parent directory if not set.

default_report_id.description: Default regression report ID. Use 'latest' for most recent.

reports_root.description: Root directory for coverage reports (e.g. URG HTML output).

coverage_model_root.description: Root directory for coverage model SystemVerilog source files.

filelist.description: Path to the RTL filelist (.f file).

path.description: Path to the design database (e.g. simv.daidir).

index_path.description: Path to the pre-built RTL index directory.

path.description: Path to the register definition file.

ral_root.description: Root directory for UVM RAL model source files.

index_path.description: Path to the pre-built register index.

env_root.description: Root directory for the UVM testbench environment.

base_test.description: Name of the base test class to extend.

agent_root.description: Root directory for UVM agent source files.

config_root.description: Root directory for UVM configuration classes.

test_root.description: Root directory for UVM test classes.

index_path.description: Path to the pre-built TB index.

run_cmd_template.description: Run command template. Use {test} and {seed} placeholders.

urg_cmd_template.description: URG report generation command template. Placeholders: {vdb_dir}, {report_dir}

urg_timeout_seconds.description: Timeout for URG report generation in seconds

timeout_seconds.description: Timeout for compile/run simulation in seconds

results_root.description: Directory for simulation results, relative to project_root

vdb_dir_template.description: Template for VDB directory path. Placeholders: {test}, {seed}

allow_direct_file_modification.description: Whether the agent can directly modify source files. If false, only output diffs/patches.

allow_running_simulation.description: Whether the agent can trigger simulation runs.

require_human_review_before_commit.description: Whether generated outputs require human review before being committed.

index_path.description: Path to the pre-built document index.
